prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this. That task you've been avoiding? It’s not as big or scary as your mind’s making it out to be. The hardest part is starting—but once you do, momentum takes over. Don’t aim for perfect; just aim for *done*. Every great accomplishment began with someone deciding to begin. So take a breath, open that file, send that email, make that call—**right now**. Future you will thank present you for not waiting another minute. Go! 💪
